levels.name: Ad hoc
levels.meaning: Agent receives vague prompt and guesses.

levels.name: Tasked
levels.meaning: Agent has task cards and allowed files.

levels.name: Verified
levels.meaning: Agent must run commands and report evidence.

levels.name: Reviewed
levels.meaning: Agent output is scored and reviewed.

levels.name: Autonomous pipeline
levels.meaning: Agent can branch, test, PR and hand off reliably.

blockers: no real benchmark artifact exists yet
